summary: All three requirements are implemented. REQ-1 is satisfied by the new LoginOverlay component with full-screen fixed overlay, email/password fields, login button, and validation. REQ-2 is satisfied by the useAuth hook using localStorage key 'iq_auth_token' with read-on-load, write-on-login, and remove-on-logout behavior. REQ-3 is satisfied by the onLogout prop added to Sidebar, which renders a Sign Out button, and the logout function is wired in App.tsx. No routing, analytics, chart, regression, insights, or PDF export logic appears to have been modified.

hallucinated_features.description: Password visibility toggle (show/hide password) with Eye/EyeOff icons
hallucinated_features.reason: The LoginOverlay includes a showPassword toggle with Eye/EyeOff icons, which was not requested in any requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Decorative background blur/glow pattern in the login overlay
hallucinated_features.reason: The overlay includes decorative radial gradient blur elements as a background pattern, which was not part of the requirements.
A 600ms artificial async delay was added to simulate login, which was not requested.
